name: tarkeeb-pro-apk
description: Android APK wrapper for RentIT using Capacitor

scripts.sync: npm run build:web && npm run use:admin && npm run prepare:assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:admin: npm run build:web && npm run use:admin && npm run prepare:assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:technician: npm run build:web && npm run use:technician && npm run prepare:assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk:admin: npm run check:build-env && npm run sync:admin && npm run ensure:android-sdk && cd android && node ../scripts/run-gradle.mjs :app:assembleAdminDebug && node ../scripts/collect-apks.mjs admin
scripts.build:apk:technician: npm run check:build-env && npm run sync:technician && npm run ensure:android-sdk && cd android && node ../scripts/run-gradle.mjs :app:assembleTechnicianDebug && node ../scripts/collect-apks.mjs technician
scripts.build:apk:all: npm run build:apk:admin && npm run build:apk:technician
